Notes: change the login from Google to regular login process
Fix Details: Added email/password login support. Multi-module fix: login.html (email login form + tab switcher), backend/lambda/auth-email-login.js (email + username lookup), auth-set-password.js, auth-forgot-password.js, auth-reset-password.js. Users can now log in with email+password without Google OAuth.

Notes: In the  Properties screen, user should be able to search based on the Floor number instead of going through next page to go to 10th page
Fix Details: admin/metadata/properties.html: added floor_number (type: number) filter to CFG.filters array. maintenance.js renders this as a numeric input dropdown so users can filter properties by floor number directly.

Notes: In the unit bookings screen, there should be a dropdown of projects along with Type dropdown. when the Unit is Sold what was the reason it is showing active, help me understand.
Fix Details: admin/metadata/unit-bookings.html: added project_id as first filter (entity: projects) and booking_type as second filter. Added fetchFn to join unit-bookings with properties via GraphQL to add project_id field (unit-bookings records only have property_id, not project_id directly). Note: 'Active' status on sold units is a separate display label from the booking_type field — booking_type=sold is the correct indicator.

Notes: In the car parking slots screen, in the status drop down the word All Statuss spelling has to changed to All Status
Fix Details: unit-master/car-parking.html line 116: corrected typo 'All Statuss' → 'All Status' in the status dropdown default option text.

Notes: The logout was done automatically. The logout should not be automatic. User decides when to logout. If user is about to timeout, it should show a warning and allow to extend for {SESSION_TIMEOUT} minutes({SESSION_TIMEOUT is configured in Env variable with default to 30 minutes)
Fix Details: src/utils/session-timeout.js completely rewritten: fetches sessionTimeoutMinutes from /api/site-config (env: SESSION_TIMEOUT, default 30). Shows warning modal 2 minutes before expiry with 'Stay signed in' / 'Sign out now' buttons and countdown. Multi-module: backend/server.js adds sessionTimeoutMinutes to /api/site-config; .env.example adds SESSION_TIMEOUT=30.

Fix Details: admin/metadata/property-types.html: added project_id as first filter (entity: projects, labelField: name). maintenance.js auto-selects current project from localStorage amr_selected_project.

Notes: In the Unit Type Variants screen or any other screen, the filter should always have first dropdown of projects list instead of all columns
Fix Details: admin/metadata/unit-type-variants.html: added project_id as first filter (entity: projects, labelField: name) to CFG.filters array.

Notes: In the Price Estimator screen, make sure all the fields are entered by validation before moving to the payment schedule screen
Fix Details: price-estimator.html: doViewSchedule() now calls validateCustomer() and buildEstimate() before navigating. If required fields (customer name, phone, flat type, building, flat selection) are missing, navigation is blocked and inline error is shown.

Notes: In the Price Estimator Grid  screens, the seach  has to be individual dropdowns either by flat number or first name or phone number or lead
Fix Details: saved-estimates.html: replaced single text search input with 4 select dropdowns (filterFlat, filterFirstName, filterPhone, filterLead). Added populateDropdowns() that fills selects from loaded data, clearFilters() to reset all, and updated applyFilters() to use select values. Old searchInput element removed.

Notes: In the Payment schedule Grid screens, the seach has to be individual dropdowns either by flat number or first name or phone number or lead
Fix Details: The Payment Schedule Grid IS saved-estimates.html (payment schedules are accessed via View Schedule from the saved estimates grid). Issue #13 applied the individual filter dropdowns to this file. Same fix covers both Issue #13 and #14.

Notes: Payment Schedule screen is not loading  from the side menu click
Fix Details: backend/server.js: added GET /paymentschedule route serving payment-schedule.html (matches sidebar href), GET /payment-schedule alias route, and GET /saved-estimates route serving saved-estimates.html. src/utils/sidebar.js: confirmed payment_schedule nav item href already set to /paymentschedule.

Notes: In the users screen; password column has to be editable for super admin when Edit button is clicked. New password can be entered for resetting.
Fix Details: admin/users.html: added Reset Password section to the user detail panel (visible only when localStorage role === 'super_admin') with password input and Set New Password button calling resetPassword(userId). backend/routes/user-admin.js: added POST /api/user-admin/users/:id/reset-password endpoint that bcrypt-hashes (cost 12) and updates users.json.

Notes: In the User Project access screen; instead of showing a usernumber; we have to show the username. Also we should be able to take away the access.
Fix Details: admin/metadata/user-projects.html: changed labelField from 'name' to 'full_name' for users lookup. Added lookupFetchFns.users that fetches via GraphQL and computes full_name = first_name + last_name. Added rowActions with 'Remove Access' button and onRowAction handler that calls DELETE /api/user-projects/:id.
